steps.t: The Draig-lûth camps are east and north-east of Harndirion. Gronu has asked you to seek out Pruv Cadlus and Sarf Cadlus on the eastern slope below Har…
Gronu's camp lies almost due north of Harndirion. You should return to Gronu and let him know that you have defeated many of the sentries near Pruv Ca…
